attributes.description: Overview of Vulnerability logs from XM Cyber.

params.markdown:
**Overview**

The XM Cyber Vulnerability dashboard surfaces a single-pane view of CVEs detected across your environment over time, with breakdowns by severity, status, and CVSS scoring version to highlight where the most impactful exposures sit and how the scoring landscape splits across legacy and current standards.
 
KPI tiles of total CVEs detected, total active CVEs, and actively exploited CVEs, alongside a monthly trend of new CVE discoveries, help analysts quickly gauge the size of the backlog, surface in-the-wild exploitation hotspots, and spot surges of newly-identified exposures. Filters for severity, status, CVSS version, and exploitation flags let teams pivot the dashboard to investigate specific cohorts, prioritize critical findings, and maintain ongoing vulnerability visibility across their XM Cyber environment.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/xm_cyber)**
